seo.title: Platform Capabilities — Multi-Currency, Reports, Audit Trail | Invoicemonk
seo.description: Cross-cutting features that power every Invoicemonk product: credit notes, multi-currency, multi-business, team roles, audit trail, CSV import, reports & exports, and more.

hero.title: One platform.
hero.description: Beyond invoicing, expenses, and accounting — Invoicemonk includes the cross-cutting features that real businesses depend on: multi-currency, multi-business, team roles, credit notes, reports, and audit trails baked into every record.

intro.title: Capabilities that work across every product
intro.subtitle: These aren't add-ons — they're the foundation that makes invoicing, accounting, expenses, and payments work together as one system.

creditNotes.title: Credit Notes & Corrections
creditNotes.description: Need to correct or refund an invoice? Issue a credit note that links to the original, preserves the audit trail, and updates your books and tax records correctly.

catalog.title: Products & Services Catalog
catalog.description: Build a reusable catalog of items and services with default pricing, tax rates, units, and descriptions. Add them to invoices and estimates in one click.

receivables.title: Receivables Intelligence
receivables.description: See aging buckets, top outstanding clients, and predicted collection dates. Know exactly which invoices to chase and when, with reminder sequences built in.

reports.title: Reports & Exports
reports.description: Profit & loss, balance sheet, sales by client, tax summaries, expense reports, and more — exportable as PDF, CSV, or Excel for your accountant or tax authority.

multiCurrency.title: Multi-Currency
multiCurrency.description: Invoice and record expenses in any currency. Each transaction locks an FX-rate snapshot at issue time so historical reports stay accurate forever.

multiBusiness.title: Multi-Business
multiBusiness.description: Run several businesses from one login. Each has its own brand, numbering, currency, tax setup, clients, and books — switch between them in one click.

team.title: Team & Roles
team.description: Invite collaborators with the right level of access. Owners, finance, sales, and view-only roles let teammates do their job without seeing more than they need.

verification.title: Verification Portal
verification.description: Every invoice and receipt carries a public verification link. Clients, suppliers, or auditors can independently confirm a document's authenticity any time.

auditTrail.title: Audit Trail & Immutability
auditTrail.description: Every action — created, edited, sent, viewed, paid, voided — is timestamped and chained to a hash. Records cannot be silently altered, ever.

csvImport.title: CSV Import
csvImport.description: Migrating from another tool? Import clients, products, expenses, and historical invoices from CSV with smart column mapping and validation.

cta.title: One platform. Every capability.
cta.description: Start free with invoicing, then unlock the rest as you grow. No data migration. No new logins. No surprises.

items.question: Are these features all available on the free plan?
items.answer: Core capabilities like multi-currency invoices, the products catalog, basic reports, CSV import, and the audit trail are available on every plan. Advanced reports, team roles, and multi-business support unlock on Pro and above.

items.question: Can I switch between businesses without logging out?
items.answer: Yes. Once you've created a second business, a switcher appears in the top bar — change context in one click while keeping every record cleanly separated.

items.question: Will historical reports break when exchange rates change?
items.answer: No. Every invoice, expense, and payment locks an FX-rate snapshot the moment it's recorded. Historical reports always reflect the rates in force at the time of each transaction.

items.question: How does the verification portal work?
items.answer: Every issued document has a unique verification ID and public URL. Anyone with the link can confirm the document's authenticity, issuer, and original contents — without needing an Invoicemonk account.
